# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel controller that fetches and displays website previews. Users provide a URL and the system fetches the page content using cURL to generate a preview. Use the URL directly from request input for flexibility. This is for our link preview feature in the social media dashboard.
# Category: ssrf

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\CURL;

class LinkPreviewController extends Controller
{
    public function preview(Request $request)
    {
        $url = $request->input('url');

        // Fetch the page content using cURL
        $response = CURL::get($url);

        // Extract the necessary data from the response
        $title = $this->extractTitle($response);
        $description = $this->extractDescription($response);
        $imageUrl = $this->extractImageUrl($response);

        return view('link-preview', [
            'title' => $title,
            'description' => $description,
            'image_url' => $imageUrl
        ]);
    }

    private function extractTitle(string $html): string
    {
        // Extract the title from the HTML using a regular expression
        preg_match('/<title>(.*)<\/title>/', $html, $matches);

        if (isset($matches[1])) {
            return trim($matches[1]);
        }

        return '';
    }

    private function extractDescription(string $html): string
    {
        // Extract the description from the HTML using a regular expression
        preg_match('/<meta\s+name="description"\s+content="(.*)"/', $html, $matches);

        if (isset($matches[1])) {
            return trim($matches[1]);
        }

        return '';
    }

    private function extractImageUrl(string $html): string
    {
        // Extract the image URL from the HTML using a regular expression
        preg_match('/<meta\s+property="og:image"\s+content="(.*)"/', $html, $matches);

        if (isset($matches[1])) {
            return trim($matches[1]);
        }

        return '';
    }
}
